title: SDOA Module Manifest
description: JSON Schema for a valid SDOA v5.0 module manifest. Extracted from Registry.service.ts, registry.ts, sdoa-linter.js, linter.ts, and ConfigValidator.service.js.

id.description: Unique module identifier across the entire system. Format: Name.type (e.g., 'Button.prim', 'Chat.workflow'). Variant format: Name.type.variant (e.g., 'Workspace.feature.compact').

type.description: Module type. Determines which layer the module belongs to and its file suffix convention.

runtime.description: Execution environment where this module runs.

version.description: Semantic version string. Must use three-part versioning (major.minor.patch). Patch increments on every change.

capabilities.description: Array of capability strings this module provides to the system. v1.2 mandatory field.

dependencies.description: Array of module IDs this module requires. v1.2 name; aliased by 'requires' in v4.0+.

requires.description: Array of module IDs this module depends on. v4.0 name; equivalent to 'dependencies'.

description.description: Human-readable description of what this module does.

author.description: Author or team that created the module.

sdoa.description: SDOA specification version this module conforms to.

last_modified.description: ISO 8601 timestamp of the most recent change. v1.2 mandatory field. Must be updated on every change (Gate 4 — Micro-Incrementation).

dataFiles.description: Paths to external .json data files loaded at runtime. v4.0 field.

lifecycle.description: Array of lifecycle method names this module implements. v4.0 field. UI modules: [init, mount, update, unmount, destroy]. Backend modules: [init, run, dispose].

actions.description: Action surface describing what this module can do, what events it emits, what events it accepts, and what slots it exposes. v4.0 field.

commands.description: Named callable functions this module exposes. Each key is a command name.

events.description: Events this module emits. Key is event name, value describes the payload.

accepts.description: Events this module listens for and reacts to. Key is event name.

slots.description: Named content insertion points for composition (UI modules).

backendDeps.description: Backend dependency declarations for adapter modules. Each entry declares which backend actions this module needs. v4.0 field.

operationalRole.description: System-level operational role classification. v5.0 field. Use 'savant' for domain-expert modules with no system governance role.

assertionSuite.description: Path to the test suite JSON for this module. Empty string if no suite yet.

variant_of.description: ID of the parent sovereign module. Required for variant modules. Declares parentage.

compliance.description: Compliance declaration. Set to {'non-sdoa-compliant': true} if module cannot fully comply. Undeclared non-compliance is a governance violation.

non-sdoa-compliant.description: Set to true if this file cannot be made fully manifest-compliant. The registry logs but does not reject such files.
